infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Allow ConnectHub to access your camera for video calls and sending photos.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Allow ConnectHub to access your microphone for voice and video calls.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Allow ConnectHub to access your photos to send them in chats.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow ConnectHub to access your photos to send them in chats.
plugins.cameraPermission: Allow ConnectHub to access your camera to take photos.

plugins.microphonePermission: Allow ConnectHub to access your microphone to record voice messages.
